fieldDescription: Manage this mod through an intel screen entry instead of its own Management bar button (for mod compatibility). If you don't see the manage button at the bottom, try turning this on. Takes effect on the next game load.
Story points to weave one node.
Story points to transform into a tier-1 form.
Story points to transform into a tier-2 form. Available once the Reclaimer is destroyed.
Story points to respec (refunding node and form points), at 100%% bonus XP.
